pr.title: Record: 11L Parallel Muon + N-gram Backoff Cache — val_bpb 0.2841 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d Parallel Muon model uses eval-time N-gram backoff cache with entropy-adaptive blending to capture repeated patterns.
techniques: Entropy-adaptive order-2-9 N-gram cache with chunked backward updates
Parallel Muon / Parameter Banking stack with SmearGate and Gated Attention
